mapper.select: SELECT * FROM Community_Post WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY reg_date DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Post_Like WHERE post_no = #{postNo} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Post_Like (post_no, user_id, reg_date) VALUES (#{postNo}, #{userId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM Post_Like WHERE post_no = #{postNo} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE Community_Post SET like_cnt = like_cnt + #{amount} WHERE post_no = #{postNo}
UPDATE Community_Post SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, update_date = NOW() WHERE post_no = #{postNo}
mapper.select: SELECT post_no AS postNo, user_id AS userId, title, content, view_cnt AS viewCnt, like_cnt AS likeCnt, reg_date AS regDate FROM Community_Post WHERE post_no = #{postNo}
